# QOTN — Pure Cotton. Nothing Else.
# https://qotn.in

> QOTN is a D2C Indian brand selling 100% pure cotton clothing for men, women, and kids. No blends, no synthetic fibres. Made in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

## About

QOTN (Quality Of The Nation) makes everyday cotton clothing — kurtas, shirts, dresses, and more — from 100% pure cotton fabric. Founded in 2024, based in Sanganer, Jaipur.

- Material: 100% cotton (no polyester blends)
- Made in: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Ships across India. Free shipping above ₹1499.
- COD (Cash on Delivery) available.
- Custom stitching available on select products.
